title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP of Google Research, discusses the "magic cycle" of research that moves breakthroughs into real-world applications. He covers flood forecasting, MedGemma, Gemini for Science, and tools like Co-Scientist and ERA for scientific discovery. The conversation also touches on speculative decoding, generative UI, and quantum milestones including the Willow chip.
writeup: Yossi Matias, VP of Google Research, frames a "magic cycle" in which research breakthroughs move into deployed applications. The discussion spans flood forecasting, the MedGemma and Gemini for Science efforts, and scientific discovery tools including Co-Scientist and ERA. It also covers speculative decoding, generative UI, and quantum computing milestones tied to the Willow chip.
